subject: Facebook Password Reset Confirmation
body:
Hey Jeffrey,

You recently requested a new password.  To reset your password, follow the link below:
https://login.facebook.com/reset.php?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&cc=916fa6f667bd37&tt=1197976673 
(If clicking on the link doesn't work, try copying and pasting it into your browser.)

If you did not reset your password, please disregard this message.
Check out http://www.facebook.com/help.php?page=50 if you have any questions.

Thanks,
The Facebook Team
